'''âr-v-b''' ('''karavab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polyubiquitinylate|polyubiquitinylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polyubiquitinylate|polyubiquitinylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-v-b
|-
! Lemma
| karavab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiravab|thiravab]] || [[word:jiravab|jiravab]] || [[word:shiravab|shiravab]] || [[word:kiravab|kiravab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuravab|thuthuravab]] || [[word:jujuravab|jujuravab]] || [[word:shushuravab|shushuravab]] || [[word:kukuravab|kukuravab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuravab|thuravab]] || [[word:juravab|juravab]] || [[word:shuravab|shuravab]] || [[word:kuravab|kuravab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuravab|thuravab]] || [[word:juravab|juravab]] || [[word:shuravab|shuravab]] || [[word:kuravab|kuravab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theravab|theravab]] || [[word:jeravab|jeravab]] || [[word:sheravab|sheravab]] || [[word:keravab|keravab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoravab|thothoravab]] || [[word:jojoravab|jojoravab]] || [[word:shoshoravab|shoshoravab]] || [[word:kokoravab|kokoravab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoravab|thoravab]] || [[word:joravab|joravab]] || [[word:shoravab|shoravab]] || [[word:koravab|koravab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoravab|thoravab]] || [[word:joravab|joravab]] || [[word:shoravab|shoravab]] || [[word:koravab|koravab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠravab|thĂŠravab]] || [[word:jĂŠravab|jĂŠravab]] || [[word:shĂŠravab|shĂŠravab]] || [[word:kĂŠravab|kĂŠravab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharavab|thatharavab]] || [[word:jajaravab|jajaravab]] || [[word:shasharavab|shasharavab]] || [[word:kakaravab|kakaravab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharavab|tharavab]] || [[word:jaravab|jaravab]] || [[word:sharavab|sharavab]] || [[word:karavab|karavab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharavab|tharavab]] || [[word:jaravab|jaravab]] || [[word:sharavab|sharavab]] || [[word:karavab|karavab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharavab|sharavab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharavab|gosharavab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharavab|gokisharavab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharavabnĂŒ|sharavabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharavabnknĂŒ|gosharavabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavabnĂŒ|gokisharavabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharavabshĂ«|sharavabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharavabnkshĂ«|gosharavabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharavabshĂ«|gokisharavabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavabro|sharavabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavabnkro|gosharavabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavabro|gokisharavabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavabmu|sharavabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavabnkmu|gosharavabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavabmu|gokisharavabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharavabsher|sharavabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharavabnksher|gosharavabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharavabsher|gokisharavabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharavabng|sharavabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharavabnkng|gosharavabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharavabng|gokisharavabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharavabya|sharavabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharavabnkya|gosharavabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharavabya|gokisharavabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharavabyam|sharavabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharavabnkyam|gosharavabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharavabyam|gokisharavabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharavabnĂŒshĂ«|sharavabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharavabnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharavabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharavabnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharavabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavabnĂŒro|sharavabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavabnknĂŒro|gosharavabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavabnĂŒro|gokisharavabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavabnĂŒmu|sharavabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavabnknĂŒmu|gosharavabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavabnĂŒmu|gokisharavabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharavabshĂ«nĂŒ|sharavabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharavabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharavabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharavabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavabshĂ«ro|sharavabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavabnkshĂ«ro|gosharavabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavabshĂ«ro|gokisharavabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavabshĂ«mu|sharavabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavabnkshĂ«mu|gosharavabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavabshĂ«mu|gokisharavabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharavabronĂŒ|sharavabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharavabnkronĂŒ|gosharavabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavabronĂŒ|gokisharavabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharavabroshĂ«|sharavabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharavabnkroshĂ«|gosharavabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharavabroshĂ«|gokisharavabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavabromu|sharavabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavabnkromu|gosharavabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavabromu|gokisharavabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharavabmunĂŒ|sharavabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharavabnkmunĂŒ|gosharavabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavabmunĂŒ|gokisharavabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharavabmushĂ«|sharavabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharavabnkmushĂ«|gosharavabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharavabmushĂ«|gokisharavabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavabmuro|sharavabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavabnkmuro|gosharavabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavabmuro|gokisharavabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
